title: Another Day in Paradise
meaning_summary: Its ballad structure and continued catalog familiarity help it retain long-tail earnings power.
revenue_drivers: Adult-pop and legacy playlists support repeat streaming.
Catalog familiarity keeps the song discoverable over time.
Writer-side value adds to the song's retained economics.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate keeps the headline range as the artist-side figure and models gross track, label, publishing, and songwriter lanes from that conservative annual range.

ownership.master_owner: Likely controlled through the recording label or distributor unless a specific rights sale is known
ownership.publishing_owner: Writer and publisher splits affect the publishing share shown here
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No specific catalog sale adjustment is modeled for this track
ownership.notes: Another Day in Paradise is modeled from public-facing catalog behavior and conservative rights-split assumptions, not from audited royalty statements.
